options.systemMessage:
You are a senior social media manager. For each target platform you must:
1. Rewrite the caption in a voice that fits the platform (Instagram: punchy + emoji; Facebook: friendly + conversational; LinkedIn: professional + value-driven).
2. Add 3-7 relevant, trending hashtags per platform.
3. Score overall content quality (0-100) considering: clarity, hook strength, hashtag relevance, platform-fit, and call-to-action.
4. Give 1-2 sentences of quality feedback.

Return JSON exactly matching the schema. Do not include any text outside the JSON.

parameters.subject: =🚨 Social Publisher Failure — Row {{ $json.row_id }}

parameters.content: # Auto-Publish Polished Social Posts From Your Google Sheets Calendar

# Overview
When the 10-minute schedule fires (or you click Manual Trigger), this workflow reads the Google Sheets content calendar, AI-enhances each due post, and publishes to Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn:

1. Merge schedule and manual triggers, read the Calendar tab in Google Sheets
2. Filter to only posts that are Scheduled, due now, and under 3 retries
3. Loop over each post and send it through a GPT-4o-mini agent for caption rewrite, hashtags, and a 0-100 quality score
4. If quality score is at least 60, publish to Instagram (2-step), Facebook, and LinkedIn via HTTP calls
5. Mark the row Published, or bump Retry Count and log the failure
6. On any failure, append to the Error Log sheet and send Gmail and Slack alerts

# Node-by-node Purpose

1. Schedule Trigger
Runs the workflow every 10 minutes.

2. Manual Trigger
Lets a human kick off the same flow on demand.

3. Merge Triggers
Combines schedule and manual triggers into one path.

4. Read Content Calendar
Pulls every row from the Calendar tab in Google Sheets.

5. Filter Due Posts
Code node: keeps only Scheduled, due, and under 3 retries; normalizes platforms.

6. Has Due Posts?
IF: if row_id exists, proceed; otherwise end.

7. Loop Over Posts
SplitInBatches that handles one post at a time.

8. AI Enhance Content
LangChain agent that rewrites captions and adds hashtags per platform.

9. OpenAI Chat Model
GPT-4o-mini at 0.7 temperature powering the agent.

10. Structured Output Parser
Forces AI output into a strict JSON schema.

11. Parse AI Output
Flattens per-platform text and reattaches row metadata.

12. Quality Check
IF: only posts with quality_score at least 60 move on.

13. IG - Create Container
Creates the Instagram media container via Graph API.

14. IG - Publish Container
Publishes the Instagram media container.

15. Facebook - Publish Photo
Posts the photo to the Facebook Page.

16. LinkedIn - Publish Post
Publishes the UGC post to LinkedIn publicly.

17. Platform Results
Code node that collects the three responses and computes all_ok.

18. All Platforms OK?
IF: true sets Published; false bumps Retry Count and logs error.

19. Update Status - Published
Writes Status = Published and timestamp, then loops.

20. Increment Retry Count
Adds 1 to Retry Count and saves the first error, then loops.

21. Build Error Log
Builds a clean error record for the Error Log sheet.

22. Log Error to Sheet
Appends the error record to the Error Log tab.

23. Gmail - Error Alert
Sends an email with the failure details to the team.

24. Slack - Error Alert
Posts a failure notification to Slack, then loops.
